Spoilers but HOLY SHIT IM SO EXCITED TO SEE THE DEATH DEVIL. I’ve been obsessed with how everything might play out with her when she’s finally revealed and the buildup has been pretty good. Hopefully we don’t have to wait another year or smth 🙏

I think I said this in my last announcement but I might switch from Janitor soon. I do plan to stay with this site, yet I may make an account of Wyvern. I won’t make an announcement bot for it (so daddy Shep doesn’t hurt me) but I’ll put it on my profile so look out for that.

Wesghost finally dropped a new song

Gonna be testing this for a while even after releasing it. My last death devil bot blew up so I wanna make sure this works well.
